name: lint-backend
description: Rails backend for lint.to and the Lint platform APIs.

scripts.bundler:ensure: npm run runtime:check && script/runtime_exec ruby script/ensure_bundler.rb
scripts.server: npm run runtime:check && script/runtime_exec bin/rails server
scripts.db:setup: npm run runtime:check && script/runtime_exec bin/rails db:create db:migrate db:seed
scripts.db:prepare: npm run runtime:check && script/runtime_exec bin/rails db:prepare
scripts.console: npm run runtime:check && script/runtime_exec bin/rails console
scripts.test: npm run runtime:check && script/runtime_exec bin/rails test
scripts.lint: npm run runtime:check && script/runtime_exec bin/bundle exec rubocop --fail-level error
scripts.lint:strict: npm run runtime:check && script/runtime_exec bin/bundle exec rubocop
scripts.security: npm run runtime:check && script/runtime_exec bin/bundle exec brakeman -i config/brakeman.ignore --ensure-ignore-notes --ensure-no-obsolete-ignore-entries
scripts.security:strict: npm run runtime:check && script/runtime_exec bin/bundle exec brakeman -i config/brakeman.empty.ignore
scripts.verify: npm run bundler:ensure && npm run lint && npm test && npm run security

author: Jimmy Douieb
